skill_execution.question: Who set the fastest lap in qualifying?

sql:
SELECT
    pd.full_name,
    pd.driver_code,
    lc.race_name,
    FORMAT("%02d:%02d.%03d",
        CAST(FLOOR(lc.lap_time_ms / 60000) AS INT64),
        CAST(FLOOR(MOD(lc.lap_time_ms, 60000) / 1000) AS INT64),
        CAST(MOD(lc.lap_time_ms, 1000) AS INT64)
    ) AS fastest_lap_time
FROM
    f1_data_library_DS.laps_clean AS lc
JOIN
    f1_data_library_DS.public_drivers AS pd
ON
    lc.driver_id = pd.driver_id
WHERE
    lc.session_type = 'Q'
    AND lc.season = 2026
ORDER BY
    lc.lap_time_ms ASC
LIMIT 1
